title: AXI references and scoped Vitis interface request guidance

metadata.content_policy: Project-authored short paraphrases and citations only; specifications are not redistributed.
metadata.coverage_boundary: Executable guidance is limited to the AMD Vitis HLS 2024.2 INTERFACE request and its exact port scope; Arm AXI4, AXI4-Lite, and AXI4-Stream sections are versioned citation-only references because no complete interface-contract extractor is currently implemented.
metadata.hlsgraph_local_derivation_policy: Port-scope identity, fail-closed protocol applicability, and the prohibition on inferring external connectivity are HLSGraph evidence policies; the citations establish only the named protocol and directive semantics.

documents.title: Vitis High-Level Synthesis User Guide
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the guide is not included in HLSGraph.

documents.title: AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the specification is not included in HLSGraph.

documents.title: AMBA AXI-Stream Protocol Specification
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the specification is not included in HLSGraph.

rules.title: Keep Vitis AXI interface mode attached to its port scope
rules.summary: Vitis INTERFACE mode m_axi, s_axilite, or axis is a request on a named port of the configured top component; it does not by itself prove the generated adapter or any external system connection.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no specification text is redistributed.

entries.rationale: The current extractors do not emit exact AXI4 or AXI4-Lite protocol revision, endpoint role, channel direction, and interface-instance evidence as one closed contract; retain this versioned section as a citation only.

The current extractors do not emit exact AXI4-Stream specification revision, transmitter or receiver role, signal direction, and interface-instance evidence as one closed contract; retain this versioned section as a citation only.

target_inventory.rationale: A generic HLSGraph port has no proven AXI specification revision, endpoint role, channel direction, or interface-instance contract; the current source extractor records its direction as unknown.
A generic HLSGraph stream has no proven AXI4-Stream specification revision, transmitter or receiver role, signal direction, or interface-instance contract.
HLSGraph STREAMS_TO is directional internal design evidence; it carries neither an AXI4-Stream specification revision nor proven transmitter, receiver, and external interface-instance identities.
